mapper.sql: id, app_id, flow_id, flow_version_id, flow_version_number, flow_name_cn, flow_name_en, trigger_type, trigger_account, status, rate_limit_status, cache_status, cache_key, cache_ttl_remaining, error_code, error_message, duration_ms, trigger_time, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_v2_cp_execution_record_t ( id, app_id, flow_id, flow_version_id, flow_version_number, flow_version_snapshot, flow_name_cn, flow_name_en, trigger_type, trigger_account, status, rate_limit_status, cache_status, cache_key, cache_ttl_remaining, error_code, error_message, duration_ms, trigger_time, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{appId}, #{flowId}, #{flowVersionId}, #{flowVersionNumber}, #{flowVersionSnapshot}, #{flowNameCn}, #{flowNameEn}, #{triggerType}, #{triggerAccount}, #{status}, #{rateLimitStatus}, #{cacheStatus}, #{cacheKey}, #{cacheTtlRemaining}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{durationMs}, #{triggerTime}, #{createTime}, #{lastUpdateTime}, #{createBy}, #{lastUpdateBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_cp_execution_record_t SET status = #{status}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, rate_limit_status = #{rateLimitStatus}, cache_status = #{cacheStatus}, cache_key = #{cacheKey}, cache_ttl_remaining = #{cacheTtlRemaining}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
